entities.name: Auto-routing
entities.context: Automatic file routing triggered when analysis confidence reaches ≥85%

entities.name: TTL policy
entities.context: Time-to-live rule requiring files not stay in Inbox longer than 14 days

entities.name: Confidence-based routing
entities.context: Three-tier system: auto-route (≥85%), suggested (60-84%), manual review (<60%)

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Staging area for incoming files awaiting routing to permanent locations

relationships.context: Script executes the review generation process
Tool is part of the N5 system infrastructure
Identifies files ready for automatic routing
Checks for TTL violations exceeding 14 days
Groups files by confidence level for appropriate handling
Generates REVIEW.md output in Inbox folder
